mechanism.economic_hypothesis: The relative external creation and redemption imbalance reported by SPY and QQQ is a quarterly revealed-demand signal; hold the fund with the strictly stronger external-flow imbalance.

signal.external_net: sum of monthly sales minus monthly redemptions; reinvestment excluded
signal.external_gross: sum of monthly sales plus monthly redemptions
signal.selection: QQQ only when QQQ imbalance is strictly greater than SPY imbalance; otherwise SPY
signal.zero_denominator: SPY fail-closed fallback, absent from accepted 27-pair source package
signal.decision_session: first accepted XNYS session whose 08:30 cutoff is strictly later than pair_initial_available_at
signal.amendments: latest accession accepted by the frozen cutoff; later amendments cannot rewrite a decision

portfolio.strategy: 100 percent SPY or 100 percent QQQ subject to whole shares and settled cash
portfolio.quarterly_comparator: 50 percent SPY and 50 percent QQQ using the same cash-account settlement contract
portfolio.buyhold_comparator: buy SPY once at the first decision open and hold
portfolio.decision_price: preceding accepted session raw close available before 08:30

cash_settlement.phase_a: sell only frozen excess shares at the pair-decision raw open
cash_settlement.phase_b: on the final accepted settlement session, buy only frozen deficits; do not sell or recompute targets
cash_settlement.settlement_transition: T+2 before 2024-05-28 and T+1 on and after 2024-05-28
cash_settlement.affordability: rising prices cap Phase B at affordable whole shares
cash_settlement.same_state: may invest settled distribution cash toward the frozen count and does not change signal

corporate_actions.cash_distribution: freeze entitlement from session-open shares on official ex-date and settle on official pay date
corporate_actions.split: a split between Phase A and Phase B fails closed

measurement.interval_return: one pair-decision pre-trade NAV to the next pair-decision pre-trade NAV
measurement.maximum_drawdown: daily accepted-session opening NAV after corporate actions and scheduled trades, with initial USD 40000 point included
measurement.terminal_pair: pre-trade mark only; terminal state is not traded and no next-interval cost enters

gates_per_segment: strategy terminal wealth strictly above quarterly 50/50 comparator
strategy arithmetic mean interval return strictly above quarterly 50/50 comparator
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than SPY buy-and-hold
accepted_limitations: Distribution announcement timestamps are incomplete; action amounts are retrospective ex-date entitlement and pay-date cash inputs only, never signals or target-sizing inputs.
XNYS is the reference execution clock; QQQ remains Nasdaq-listed and requires an exact raw bar on every retained reference session.
All historical results through 2026-06-30 are exploratory and nonconfirmatory.
